fullRun.note: Twelve results were contaminated by web exit and were rerun.

rows.scenario: assignments matrix inline edit triggers preview bar
rows.reason: Test selected the sidebar Projects link and built /projects/undefined/assignments; current assignment preview/apply is covered by projects-assignments-write.spec.ts.
Uses undefined project id and removed labels/testid; current calendar preview/apply is covered by projects-calendars-write.spec.ts.
Current schedule has compensating Undo button, but no Ctrl+Shift+Z binding and no old planning-workspace testid.

rows.scenario: resource matrix cell opens day drawer
rows.reason: Hardcodes missing project-alpha and removed testids; current resource drilldown exists on live project.

rows.scenario: project settings shows custom field definitions
rows.reason: Current Settings has no custom-field definitions or explicit empty state.
Current schedule has no drag-fill handle or equivalent multi-row date fill.
Current schedule has no clipboard or TSV paste handler.
Current quick-create supports Enter and Tab, but Insert/F2/ArrowDown grid workflow is absent.

rows.scenario: schedule workspace has no critical axe violations
rows.reason: Axe target is removed planning-workspace testid; current schedule needs a migrated a11y check.

rows.scenario: gantt pane has no critical axe violations
rows.reason: Axe target is removed planning-gantt-pane testid; current Gantt needs a migrated a11y check.

rows.scenario: opens schedule workspace with WBS and Gantt panes
rows.reason: Current live traversal confirms both WBS table and Gantt; only old testids are gone.

rows.scenario: gantt bar position responds to zoom scale
rows.reason: Current schedule exposes Day, Week and Month plus bars; test helper blocks on removed workspace testid.

rows.scenario: renders dependency connectors when plan has links
rows.reason: Current live Gantt renders dependencies; test helper blocks on removed workspace testid.

rows.scenario: shows conflict banner after remote plan version bump
rows.reason: Backend version conflict handling exists, but old explicit conflict-banner contract is not covered on current UI.

rows.scenario: planning resources tab shows monthly matrix
rows.reason: Current resource matrix exists and has fresh E2E; planning-resource-matrix testid was removed.

rows.scenario: resources pane opens from project tab
rows.reason: Current Resources route is covered by route matrix; planning-resources-pane testid was removed.

rows.scenario: wbs grid exposes saved views dropdown
rows.reason: No saved-views control or persistence exists on current schedule.
Calendar exceptions moved to Calendars and use the global preview gate; old settings pane contract was removed.
